pipeline.role: Key Account Manager - Singapore Business Development
pipeline.eval_reason: 7年間のアカウントマネジメント・データドリブンなマーケティング戦略経験がShopeeのキーアカウント管理業務と高い親和性を持つ。
fit_bullets: TDCXでの7年間のアカウントマネジメント経験がキーアカウント育成業務に直結する
データ分析に基づくパフォーマンス最適化の実績がShopeeのKPI管理と合致する
クライアントとの信頼関係構築力とキャンペーン戦略立案・実行経験が即戦力となる
pipeline.eval_risk: EC業界での実務経験がなく、Shopeeプラットフォーム特有のカテゴリーマネジメントやセラー運用知識の習得が必要となる点。
pipeline.jd_text:
この求人について
Job Description

In charge of a set of key accounts to groom their performance on Shopee
Analyse accounts performance and operation metrics to provide solutions to optimise accounts performance
Work with accounts to execute campaign and sales strategies to achieve category and accounts ambitions
Work closely with internal teams including marketing, revenue, and operation teams to ensure all execution are completed successfully
Engage accounts to participate in Shopee campaigns and work with them to execute and deliver campaign targets
Work with category managers to define, implement and execute growth strategy
Lead in-team projects to set up improvement processes and execute new initiatives

Requirements

Bachelor's degree in any field
Relevant account management and category management experience will be a plus
Experience in e-commerce industry is preferred
Good communication capability and enjoy client facing work
Good analytical skills
A goal getter and a good team player, and not afraid to take challenges

profile:
Over the past seven years at TDCX, I have worked as a META Marketing Pro, focusing on sales and account management. During this time, I actively participated in multiple project teams and collaborated with clients across various industries to propose and execute effective marketing strategies.
With a strong commitment to performance and measurable results, I consistently maximized advertising efficiency and revenue growth through data-driven analysis and strategic recommendations. By deeply understanding client challenges and providing precise, solution-oriented proposals, I have built strong,
long-term relationships based on trust.
Moving forward, I aim to further advance my career by enhancing my sales expertise and expanding my professional capabilities to achieve even greater results as a sales professional.
